overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene, likely from Red Dead Redemption 2, showing a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast pastoral valley with distant mountains and scattered woodland. The camera remains stationary in third-person perspective as the character observes the landscape under partly cloudy afternoon skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlooking rural valley and distant mountains

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right
character shifts sitting posture and turns head to survey the landscape

agents.ego_description: character sits on rock ledge overlooking valley, remaining mostly still while occasionally adjusting posture and looking around

entered.detail: large gray rock formation where character is seated, occupying right foreground
hazy blue mountain range forming the horizon line across the valley
green rolling hills with scattered trees and vegetation filling the mid-ground
small red-roofed wooden building nestled in the valley below
clusters of green trees dotting the left side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stationary third-person view of a character sitting atop a rocky outcrop, overlooking a vast pastoral valley under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. The landscape features rolling green hills, a distant mountain range, and a small wooden cabin in the valley below. Birds periodically fly across the sky, and around the 52-second mark, the character shifts their sitting posture to look around, but otherwise the scene remains a tranquil, static observation of the rural wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary third-person perspective of a character observing a vast, tranquil pastoral valley from a high rocky outcrop. It begins with a wide view of rolling green hills and a distant mountain range under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. As birds periodically drift across the horizon, the camera captures the stillness of the rural wilderness and a small wooden cabin nestled in the valley below. The scene then shifts slightly as the character adjusts their sitting posture to look around, before returning to a state of quiet observation of the expansive landscape.
